subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Hearken thou unto My call from the precincts of My prison, for verily I am the Wronged One, the Stranger. We have summoned all unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی ان استمع ندائی من شطر سجنی و انا المظلوم الغریب قد دعونا الکل الی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
